Thesis: Conception of a Strategy to Increase Data Quality for a Predictive Analytics Application

entries.title: Working Student Machine Learning & Data Engineering
bullets: Implemented a contrastive timestamp-embedding model in Keras and integrated it into a production Python package for time-series analysis and visualization
Developed Python packages for data quality and data labeling for high-frequency time-series data, including core logic, tests, and documentation
Built unit and integration tests for data pipelines in MWAA and FastAPI services to improve reliability of ML systems

entries.title: Working Student Bioinformatics Research & Development
bullets: Developed a data pipeline transferring local research files to AWS (S3/Glue/Redshift) and making them accessible in a data warehouse
Extended a bioinformatics feature pipeline used for downstream machine learning workflows

entries.title: Cooperative Education Student
bullets: Completed internship rotations in Project Management, Business Intelligence, and Process Mining

entries.title: agentic-dev-toolkit
bullets: Built vibe, a CLI giving each task its own git branch, worktree, and tmux session, with handoff between machines
Authored a library of portable Agent Skills for the open Agent Skills format, covering e.g. codebase health checks
Technologies: Bash, tmux, git, shellcheck/shfmt, bats

entries.title: mini-vla: A Tiny, Language-Conditioned Vision-Language-Action Policy
bullets: Designed a language-conditioned spatial-attention policy that fuses a rendered scene, a typed command, and gripper state to control a 2-link arm on block-grasping tasks

Trained the policy via behavioral cloning against a closed-form analytical inverse-kinematics expert, then ported the identical architecture to TensorFlow.js so it trains live in-browser on my personal Portfolio Site
Technologies: Python, Keras, TensorFlow.js, Weights & Biases

entries.title: Large-Scale Robot Generation (Team Project)
bullets: Built an MPNN-based variational autoencoder learning latent representations of robot morphologies in MuJoCo
Implemented training and evaluation workflows in PyTorch with experiment tracking in Weights & Biases
Technologies: Python, PyTorch, MuJoCo, Weights & Biases

skills.items: Claude Code, git, CI/CD (GitHub Actions/GitLab CI), Docker
